description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular body with a prominent red casing and a black front control panel. The front panel is equipped with two large silver knobs, several smaller buttons, and a central display area, all surrounded by a textured gray speaker grille. The rear side reveals multiple ports and connectors, including audio input/output, power, and possibly network connections, along with ventilation slots for cooling. The side panels are smooth and solid red, with minimal detailing except for a small label or sticker. The overall design is modern and compact, suitable for placement on a shelf or table in an urban environment. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with metal accents and electronic components inside.
description: A compact, red stereo sound system with a black control panel, silver knobs, and a textured gray speaker grille. The rear features multiple ports and ventilation slots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black control panel with two silver knobs, several buttons, and a gray textured speaker grille.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the smooth, solid red casing with minimal detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing multiple ports, connectors, and ventilation slots on the red casing.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a smooth red surface and a small label or sticker.
attribute_brand_logo: A rectangular label on the front below the control panel with the text 'ME BORN'.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a fine, mesh-like texture with a subtle grid pattern, covering the majority of the front panel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel has two large silver knobs symmetrically placed on either side, a central display area, and a row of smaller buttons below the display, all set within a black rectangular section.
